videos.title: Learn to ski Chapter 6   The Fundamental of Carving
videos.transcript:
[Music]
we will now introduce you to the
fundamental carving
Technique we will tell you the secrets
behind the kind of turns you may have
thought were only reserved for the
experts here you see two different types
of skis the one on your left is a modern
carving
ski carving skis are much wider at the
top and bottom compared to traditional
skis but this actually makes it
easier when you edge your carving skis
and at the same time apply pressure
towards the center of the ski with your
weight the skis will automatically
create a
curve
if the skis are angled to the snow when
you start to accelerate you will
experience that the skis turn almost by
themselves keep a good distance between
your skis so you have room enough to
work with both
skis and move your body up and down in a
rhythmic
motion the easy way to a carve turn
start to ski across the slope tip the
knee which is facing downhill towards
the inside of the
turn by tipping both your ankle and your
knee you are sure to get your skis on
its
Edge now now do this using both legs
both knees and ankles should be moved so
as to tip the skis towards the inside of
the turn away from the
valley in your turn you should make sure
to move your ankles and knees further
and further towards the inside of the
turn
when you have got the hang of it try
working with both legs
simultaneously you can accelerate
gradually each time letting your skis
Point more and more downhill before you
turn your ankles and knees
sideways
when you have practiced turns to both
sides you can start to link
them find a relatively flat
slope start skiing
downhill make sure to make your
movements smooth and
controlled let the movements from side
to side decide how much your skis will
turn start the turn with your ankles and
knees when you start to accelerate you
should lean your body towards the slope
and inside the
turn the faster you go the more extreme
your sideways movements should
be the extreme movements help your skis
bite the snow even at high
speeds when you control the large radius
turns you can proceed to the narrower
ones when you are able to ski without
using your poles and still keep good
balance
then you have become a really skilled
skier

videos.title: Kevin Hill wins gold in Men’s Snowboarder X - Winter X Games
videos.description:
Kevin Hill wins a gold, Omar Visintin a silver, and Nate Holland a bronze medal in the Men's Snowboarder X final at X Games Aspen 2015.
SUBSCRIBE ► http://xgam.es/YouTube

X Games has been spreading the shred in action sports since 1995. For more coverage and highlights visit the official home at http://xgames.com

---------

Twitter ► https://twitter.com/xgames
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/XGames
Instagram ► https://instagram.com/xgames/

---------

Thanks for watching X Games!
